prompt: Recreate this figure on a CLEAN PURE WHITE background instead of the dark one. Keep the SAME full-body, front-facing human figure (head to feet, standing, facing camera), the SAME detailed anatomical BRAIN at the top of the head, the SAME DNA double-helix running down the center of the torso, the SAME translucent botanical leaves and leaf-vein / nerve networks woven through the whole body, and the SAME warm GOLD / amber color. Render the figure as an elegant luminous GOLDEN anatomical illustration — fine glowing golden linework and translucent golden forms with soft warm golden luminosity and a gentle halo — sitting cleanly on a solid PURE WHITE background. Premium, refined, mystical-wellness aesthetic. Replace all the dark/black background and cosmic dust with clean bright white; keep delicate golden particles subtle so they read against white. No text, no logos. Centered full-body 1:1 square composition with comfortable white space on the left and right.
